candidates.title: Command Garden Day 5: Growth Tree Visualization & Social Shareability Sprint

winner.title: The homepage now grows a visual garden of shipped features
winner.summary: Ship a visually compelling, community-requested feature that makes Command Garden's daily growth tangible and irresistible to share on Bluesky.

headline: The homepage now grows a visual garden of shipped features
summary: The homepage now shows a visual garden where each shipped feature appears as a small plant. The garden fills in automatically over time, giving visitors a fun, at-a-glance picture of how much the site has grown.
rationale: The homepage now shows a visual garden where each shipped feature appears as a small plant. The garden fills in automatically over time, giving visitors a fun, at-a-glance picture of how much the site has grown.

bluesky_post.headline: Command Garden now grows a visual garden on the homepage
bluesky_post.body: Every shipped feature becomes a plant. The garden fills in over time — one plant per day. Watch it grow at commandgarden.com
bluesky_post.alt_text: Homepage showing CSS-drawn plants representing shipped features, arranged in a row like a growing garden

replyTemplates.whatIs: It's a website that grows itself — one feature a day, fully autonomous. Each day an AI pipeline picks, specs, builds, and ships a new feature. commandgarden.com
replyTemplates.howDoesItWork: An AI pipeline runs daily: it gathers feedback, proposes features, scores them with multiple AI judges, then builds and ships the winner. Every step is transparent on the site.
replyTemplates.genericQuestion: Great question! Command Garden is an experiment in autonomous software — a site that improves itself daily through AI. Check it out at commandgarden.com
